executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are all green. The sole remaining blocker is external: marketing independent verification 4+ days stale (verdict=fail). No architecture runtime drift.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable adoption evidence so marketing independent verification can pass.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

live_last_error_details.marketing-research-daily: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart
live_last_error_details.backlink-tracker: cron: job interrupted by gateway restart

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed (verdict=fail, 4+ days stale). Primary-repo adoption measurement is flat.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on freshness and ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity, checker, verifier, and independent verification all pass. All architecture-owned gates green.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining risk is external.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Loops pypi-auto-unblocker and marketing-pulse have NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: These loops lack a self-improvement contract. When outcomes are flat, they will repeat the same tactics forever.
findings.root_cause: Loops were created without a self-improvement mandate or third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self_improvement_mandate sections, register in self_improvement_loops.json, and require independent signoff before marking healthy.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Added ordered_fix_plan with 4 prioritized items. This was the root cause of checker failure and loop-integrity error status.
repairs_applied_this_run.expected_effect: Checker passes (AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK), loop integrity clears, verifier passes.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: marketing-pulse now has agentId=main (verified via live openclaw cron list --json). Previous zombie classification was correct at time but is now outdated.
Checker → loop integrity → independent verification → verifier: all pass. Architecture-owned gates confirmed green.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence (4+ days stale, verdict=fail)
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are now all green. Marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

runtime_assertions.health_monitor_escalation_root_cause: Previous watchdog runs reported 21 jobs / 1 disabled when live state was 20/20/0. This run corrects that.

notes: Architecture green here means the architecture-owned verifier path is coherent and topology reporting is now accurate (20/20/0); it does not mean the whole stack is green.
Health monitor escalation agent_architecture_json_escalation should clear on next health-monitor check after this corrected report lands.
The remaining blocker is external marketing outcome evidence, not architecture runtime drift.
marketing-pulse zombie resolved: agentId now set to main (verified live). Previous zombie classification was accurate at time of last run but is now outdated.

ordered_fix_plan.detail: Add ordered_fix_plan key to agent_architecture_latest.json so checker passes and loop-integrity clears the agent-architecture-watchdog error status.
marketing-pulse was a zombie (enabled=True, agentId=unset). Live state now shows agentId=main assigned — verify this is intentional and stable.
Marketing independent verification is 4+ days stale (June 2), verdict=fail. This is the sole remaining whole-stack blocker. Requires measurable Codeberg-primary adoption movement.
pypi-auto-unblocker and marketing-pulse still lack self-improvement mandates. Register in self_improvement_loops.json.
